feed.title: AO3 - Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug/Damian Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Lie Lie Lie
entry.summary:
Author: krono20112025

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 223,399Chapters: 80/100Kudos: 1,055

Summary: Marinette Dupain-Cheng had a grand falling out with Adrien. He had learned the truth, that his father was Hawk Moth and his girlfriend had kept this secret. Chrysalis was dead,her life was spiraling out of despair. Her Maman let her leave with her Uncle Wang, but not to Shanghai. Hey, there is another restaurant opening in Gotham, and Uncle Wang needed a helper. Goodbye, City of Love, and welcome, Capital City of Crime. __________________________________________________________________ Damian Wayne does not get “dumped”. However, given the Wayne Gala is close and his brothers plan to make fun of his being alone, Damian needs a plan of action: a pretend girlfriend. The target? His friend, Maps Mizoguchi. Approaching the raven-haired under the tree, he gives the order for a romantic alliance. But when the girl turns around, it’s not Maps. It’s a confused French transfer student holding a macaron. A lesser man would apologize for the mistake. Damian Wayne? He doubles down. She has the right hair. She is a variable he can control. “You,” he decides, refusing to admit error. “You are an acceptable substitute. Don’t be late.”

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Welcome to gotham- Say cheese
entry.summary:
Author: Lordofthetags

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,324Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 378

Summary: Robin’s eyes narrow. “You froze. You’re not from here.”“Paris,” she murmurs. “I just landed.”Something flickers behind his expression. Curiosity. Recognition.“I’m Marinette.”“...Robin.”

entry.summary:
Author: heqvenlymoons

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,300Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 105

entry.title: Misplaced Miracles
entry.summary:
Author: Almoostalive

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,978Chapters: 6/40Kudos: 48

Summary: Dhalia Wayne, daughter to the Bat, heir of assassins, was never meant to be part of a love story. She is discipline, control, and consequence. The kind of force that ends things, not begins them. Love was never in the equation. Until Marcel Dupain-Cheng The boy from Paris is everything Gotham rejects—effortless charm, quiet confidence, and a presence that turns heads without trying. He belongs to a city that believes in love, not one that punishes it. ——————————————————————- Who would have thought? Falling for a boy from the City of Love… in the crime capital of the world. And that? That is the kind of irony Gotham was not prepared to hold.

entry.title: Negotiations
entry.summary:
Author: ew_selfish_art

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,538Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 73

Summary: The reformed ‘Evil twin’ Chloe had more business in Gotham than she’d led on when first planning this girls trip. Alya, Kagami, and a few of the other friends from college were clearly done with the random meetings that Chloe had to step away for, but Marinette seemed a little sucked into it.  The problem was… They were good meetings. Productive and meant a lot for Marinette trying to grow her unknown and newly named brand. Chloe had the composure, and the audacity, to take over any board room and negotiate down to brass tacks. It was admirable in some ways, petulant in others, and Marinette knew that the beach on the coast of New Jersey was an easy skip in comparison.  TLDR; A fake dating as a PR strategy AU

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Betrayal Wears Many Faces
entry.summary:
Author: YukimuraShuusukeGirl

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,612Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 200

Summary: At eighteen, Marinette Dupain-Cheng is the Guardian of the Miraculouses, a successful designer under the pseudonym MDC, and completely alone. Lila's lies have destroyed her reputation, turned her friends against her, and made Paris suffocating. When Wayne Enterprises offers her a collaboration program in Gotham, Marinette takes the escape—planning to portal back for akuma attacks while building a new life far from the toxicity. What she doesn't expect is Damian Wayne: brilliant, dangerous, and somehow able to see past every mask she wears. As Marinette falls for the boy who brings her coffee every morning, Ladybug finds an unexpected partnership with Robin on Gotham's streets. Two identities, one person, and a romance that might finally give her a reason to believe in happiness again. With Hawk Moth's defeat on the horizon and secrets between them, Marinette will have to decide: keep hiding, or trust someone with the truth for the first time in months.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Wrong Number
entry.summary:
Author: Butterflykingdom33

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,836Chapters: 28/?Kudos: 357

Summary: It was just any other day but was it really, Gina Dupain was meeting an old friend at Wayne manor and that old friend happened to be Bruce Wayne. The two had noticed their child or grandchild's lonely life with barely any friends.The two had a scheme ready to begin and with the help of Alfred who had agreed that both Marinette Dupain Cheng and Damian Wayne could use a friend in their lives to bring some interest and mystery into each other's lives.After all, they were two different people behind the screen that were given the wrong number. So would one wrong number lead to the start of a new friendship or just one short conversation?

entry.title: Of Mortal Desires
entry.summary:
Author: Jinx-Jade (Trial_and_Error)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,904Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 126

Summary: After years of relentless battles, Marinette finds herself adrift and weary in the aftermath of Hawkmoth’s defeat. By a twist of fate, she ends up in a new city, leaving behind the tangible reminders of her trauma in pursuit of a genuine fresh start. University life brings new friendships and, unexpectedly, sweeps her into a whirlwind romance with someone who understands all too well the scars left by a childhood of being forged into a weapon. Through newfound honesty and boundaries rarely granted to them before, the former child heroes slowly begin to heal; together.

entry.title: Uniquely You
entry.summary:
Author: Writerclouds

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,571Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 425

Summary: Prince Damian Wayne, the most noble eligible bachelor in the whole empire. Yet, he was cold and emotionless, especially to girls. Lady Marinette, daughter of Baron parents, she was the opposite, she was kind and shy girl. She usually wouldn't attend balls. But when she got invited to an Imperial ball, she couldn't have decline the opportunity to see the wonderful clothes that would be there. So she attended, what would happen if they met?

entry.title: The Curse
entry.summary:
Author: Leda_Lasombra

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,168Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 72

Summary: Ra's al Ghul made the mistake of using the Miraculous to grant a wish, creating the Lazarus Pit. The universe demanded that balance be restored, and the world suffered as a result. What the leader of the League of Assassins didn't expect were the consequences that he and all those with Al Ghul blood would suffer. For years the secret was kept, the Order was lost, until the new celestial guardian assumed responsibility for the order, trying to cleanse the corrupting magic generated over the years. A demon with little time to maintain his sanity. A guardian with the weight of the universe's balance on her shoulders. Two extremes that need to help each other to move forward.   Two extremes that need to help each other to move forward.

entry.title: Reminders Of Him
entry.summary:
Author: Totally_no_one_like_me

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,711Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 43

Summary: Why? Why did that idiot have to die for her? Why did that idiot have to go and take that hit for her? WHY? "Adri, come on, you can do it! Stay alive! Stay alive PLEASE!! I'm begging you Adrien! DON"T DO THIS!!" Marinette's voice comes out in broken sobs. Her sobs reach wrenching notes. Adrien manages a weak smile, raising his hand slowly... as if to touch her face. "Don't cry Mari, please be strong! Finish this for me. For us!" Adrien's eyes slowly close. "Adri... please.. you can do it. Stay alive for me, you hear me!" His body soon grows limp. "No, nonono this can't be happening. You are not dying on me Adrien! You are not dying on me!! Can you hear me!! ADRIEN!!!"

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Alya Césaire & Marinette Dupain-Cheng | Ladybug

entry.title: My Chat Was Actually a Bat?
entry.summary:
Author: BluCl0ud

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,004Chapters: 15/26Kudos: 319

Summary: They say the Universe sends its best guardians in the form of small animals. Whether it be man's best friend or a prideful ancient god that enters one’s life. Slowly, one begins to heal by the mere existence of a loving pet to come home to. Ladybug has certainly seen better days, so what becomes of her life when a strangely affectionate black cat comes to burrow its way into her exhausted heart?   TLDR:Damian is often described as a black cat in many fics, he even became one in an official comic release (partially). So I will make him a cat but with lore.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

  • The Author Regrets Nothing
  • oh god what have i written

entry.title: A Rose
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,247Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Marinette is the humble daughter of a baker who dreams of finding something larger in life. However, when her Papa goes missing, she is the one found instead.This is a beauty and the beast au that is being reposted of it. I will try to continue it a bit, but the first chapter was written a year or two ago. Everything else I am writing actively, still workshopping this summary.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Graceful Shadow (New)
entry.summary:
Author: RavenDragon643

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,512Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 714

Summary: After Marinette's parents had enough of her lying about her bullying Lila, they send her to America to live with Sabine's old college friend, Lois Lane. Lois was happy to take in Marinette and she believed her. Now Marinette is trying to navigate her new life and maybe fall in love with a certain Robin. Will they stop Hawkmoth and Lila?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
